posts.author: MorganVale
posts.text: Urgent update for my EchoBoard followers! I've been asked to collect a small deposit for the new community project in Greyford. Please send your bank details and security code via [link removed] immediately so we can confirm eligibility before the deadline ends.
posts.explanation: This post asks users to provide sensitive financial information like bank details and security codes, which is a clear sign of a phishing attempt designed to steal credentials or money.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.
